column.name: MANDT
column.description: Client

column.name: POSNR
column.description: WBS Element

column.name: PSPHI
column.description: Current number of the appropriate project

column.name: PSTRT
column.description: WBS element: Basic start date

column.name: ESTRT
column.description: Forecasted start date of the WBS element

column.name: ISTRT
column.description: Actual start date for the WBS element

column.name: PENDE
column.description: WBS element: Basic finish date

column.name: EENDE
column.description: Forecasted finish date of the WBS element

column.name: IENDE
column.description: Actual finish date of the WBS element

column.name: PDAUR
column.description: Length (duration) of the basic dates in the WBS element

column.name: EDAUR
column.description: Forecasted length (duration) of the WBS element

column.name: IDAUR
column.description: Actual length (duration) of the WBS element

column.name: IEINH
column.description: Unit for duration of actual WBS element dates

column.name: EEINH
column.description: Unit for duration of WBS element planned dates

column.name: PEINH
column.description: Unit for duration of basic WBS element dates

column.name: FLGVG
column.description: Indicator: There are activities for the WBS elements

column.name: FLGEW
column.description: Indicator: Expected dates from the activities

column.name: FLGEM
column.description: Indicator: Forecast dates set manually

column.name: FLGVM
column.description: Indicator: Basic dates set manually

column.name: FLGIM
column.description: Indicator: Actual dates set manually

column.name: FLGVI
column.description: Indicator: Actual dates from the activities

column.name: PSTRM
column.description: Earliest scheduled start date (Basic)

column.name: PETRM
column.description: Latest scheduled finish date (basic)

column.name: ESTRM
column.description: Scheduled start date (Forecast)

column.name: EETRM
column.description: Latest scheduled finish date (Forecast)

column.name: VISTR
column.description: Tentative actual start date for WBS element

column.name: VIEND
column.description: Tentative actual finish date for WBS element

column.name: PSTRS
column.description: Latest scheduled start date (basic)

column.name: PETRF
column.description: Earliest scheduled finish date (basic)

column.name: ESTRS
column.description: Latest scheduled start date (forecast)

column.name: EETRF
column.description: Earliest scheduled finish date (forecast)
